# CWE-140 negative: encoding/csv handles delimiters
lang: go
file: CWE-140-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/csv"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-140 Improper Neutralization of Delimiters (mitigated)
func ExportRows(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.Query("name")
	role := c.Query("role")
	var buf bytes.Buffer
	w := csv.NewWriter(&buf)
	_ = w.Write([]string{"name", "role", "status"})
	_ = w.Write([]string{name, role, "active"})
	w.Flush()
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/csv", buf.Bytes())
}
